alerts.title: Telnet Service Exposed on Server-Room Camera
alerts.description: Device 192.168.1.22 has Telnet (port 23) open with no authentication. Combined with default credentials, an attacker can gain full shell access to the camera. MITRE T0886 — Remote Services.

alerts.title: Default Credentials Detected — Server Room Camera
alerts.description: Camera at 192.168.1.22 is using factory-default username/password (admin/admin). This satisfies MITRE T0812. Immediate credential rotation required.

alerts.title: Telnet Open on Network Gateway
alerts.description: Gateway 192.168.1.1 exposes Telnet on port 23. All traffic is transmitted in plaintext. Attacker on the same network segment can capture credentials. MITRE T0886.

alerts.title: CVE-2021-33544 — Critical RCE in GoAhead Web Server
alerts.description: GoAhead WebServer 2.5.0 running on DEV-005 is affected by CVE-2021-33544 (CVSS 9.8). Stack-based buffer overflow allows unauthenticated remote code execution.

alerts.title: CVE-2019-0211 — Apache 2.4.7 Privilege Escalation
alerts.description: Apache 2.4.7 on DEV-001 is affected by CVE-2019-0211 (CVSS 9.8). Local users can escalate to root via MPM event, worker, or prefork. Upgrade to 2.4.39+.

alerts.title: Outdated TLS 1.1 on Gateway HTTPS
alerts.description: Gateway 192.168.1.1 uses TLS 1.1 which is deprecated (RFC 8996). Subject to BEAST and POODLE attacks. MITRE T0830 — Man in the Middle.

alerts.title: UPnP Enabled — Device Discovery Risk
alerts.description: Lobby camera has UPnP enabled (port 1900). UPnP can be exploited for port mapping attacks and device enumeration. MITRE T0846 — Remote System Discovery.

alerts.title: Unencrypted HTTP on Admin Mobile Device
alerts.description: Mobile device at 192.168.1.50 communicating over plain HTTP. Credentials or session tokens transmitted in cleartext are vulnerable to interception. MITRE T0830.

alerts.title: Gateway Running Firmware from 2019
alerts.description: Gateway firmware v1.0.2 (2019) has not been updated in 7 years. Multiple unpatched CVEs likely. OWASP I4 — Lack of Secure Update Mechanism.

alerts.title: CVE-2021-33544 — GoAhead RCE on Lobby Camera
alerts.description: Same GoAhead 2.5.0 vulnerability present on lobby camera. Unauthenticated remote code execution possible from the local network.

alerts.title: Default Credentials on Gateway
alerts.description: Gateway 192.168.1.1 still uses manufacturer default credentials. MITRE T0812.

audit_log.action: MITRE ATT&CK mapping applied to 9 issues
